name: Deterra Royalties Limited
description: Deterra Royalties Limited is an Australia-based company engaged in the management and growth of a portfolio of royalty assets. The company's primary asset is the Mining Area C royalty, located in the Pilbara region of Western Australia, which is operated by BHP. Deterra Royalties focuses on acquiring and managing royalties across a range of bulk commodities, base metals, and battery metals to provide investors with low-risk exposure to the resources sector.
